response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS and Docker, directly matching the required stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, internal tooling, and scalable systems demonstrates strong architectural and cross-stack capabilities. His open-source contributions and teaching background signal strong communication and engineering discipline.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal automation tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitLab)
concerns: Lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience on resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles listed with ambiguous timelines (e.g., Founder at MercadoLibre since 2016 while holding other full-time roles)
